full_text:
Cao Zhi (Zijian) 曹植 (子建)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Zhi (曹植), styledZijian (子建). Being talented in poetry and wit, he was a rival to Cao Pi in the Wei succession. Cao Zhi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Zhi lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
